results.title: Molecular profile-based adjuvant treatment for women with high-intermediate risk endometrial cancer (PORTEC-4a): results of a randomised, open-label, phase 3, multicentre, non-inferiority trial.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 41449145. 2026/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: PORTEC-4a investigated molecular risk profile-based individualised 
adjuvant treatment for women with high-intermediate risk endometrial cancer, 
aiming to reduce both overtreatment and undertreatment while optimising 
locoregional control.
METHODS: PORTEC-4a was a randomised, open-label, phase 3, multicentre, 
non-inferiority trial, conducted across eight European countries. Women (aged 
≥18 years and with a WHO performance score of ) with earl
